name: CLARITY
description: CLARITY ($CLARITY) is the antidote to crypto chaos. While the timeline screams new launches, rug pulls, shills, and panic, CLARITY is the calm that cuts through it all. It’s that silent moment you zoom out, ignore the hype, and reconnect with why you started your bold, “impossible” vision. The dream they laughed at? It’s still yours. Stay focused. See beyond the noise. CLARITY ($CLARITY) is the calm in the middle of crypto chaos. While the timeline floods with new launches, rug pulls, influencer shills, and panic sells, CLARITY helps you tune it all out. It’s the moment the screen goes quiet and you remember why you started—your bold, delusional, “impossible” vision that everyone laughed at, but you still believe in. No hype. No panic. Just signal over noise, conviction over crowd, and a return to the dream that’s still yours.
